animation.init: Initialization: Set the distance of the start node {{start}} to 0, and all other nodes to ∞
animation.extract_min: Select the unsettled node {{u}} with the smallest distance (distance={{distU}})
animation.relax_edge_true: A shorter path is found! The new distance from {{u}} to {{v}} is {{alt}}. Updating the distance table.
animation.relax_edge_false: No update needed: the new distance {{alt}} is not smaller than the current distance
animation.node_settled: All adjacent edges of node {{u}} have been examined. Its shortest path is now finalized.
animation.done_early: Node {{u}} is the target node, and its shortest path ({{distU}}) has been finalized. Ending the search early!
animation.done_unreachable: The destination node {{end}} is unreachable. Algorithm terminated.
animation.done_all: Algorithm completed! The shortest paths to all reachable nodes have been found.

ui.loadGraphTooltip: Open the interface for loading custom weighted graph data
ui.resetTooltip: Clear all data and restore the initial state
ui.runTooltip: Execute the Dijkstra shortest path algorithm
ui.noGraphData: No graph data available. Cannot specify a start/end node.
ui.startNodeNotFound: Start node node-{{val}} does not exist
ui.endNodeNotFound: End node node-{{val}} does not exist

relatedProblems.743: Single-source shortest path: Dijkstra from the source, find the minimum time for all nodes to receive a signal
relatedProblems.1631: Dijkstra variant: minimize the maximum height difference along a path, tracking current max drop with a min-heap
relatedProblems.1514: Maximum probability path: replace addition with multiplication in Dijkstra, max-heap prioritizes the highest current probability
relatedProblems.787: Shortest path with at most K stops: track steps used per node, limiting to at most k intermediate stops
relatedProblems.778: Minimum bottleneck path: Dijkstra selects the minimum water-level cell with a min-heap to reach the bottom-right corner
